FORM_CREATE.AI_AGENT_BUSINESS_INFO_PLACEHOLDER: Shop is open Monday to Friday, from 9 AM to 5 PM
FORM_CREATE.INSTRUCTION_PLACEHOLDER: Answer customer questions in a helpful and professional manner. Always use the available tools as needed and respond in Indonesian, unless the customer chats in another language.
FORM_CREATE.AI_AGENT_PERSONA_LANG_STYLE_PLACEHOLDER: You are a friendly and helpful virtual assistant. Use casual and easy-to-understand language.
FORM_CREATE.ROUTING_CONDITION_PLACEHOLDER: Determine when the AI Bot should hand over the chat to a human agent. After that, the chat status will change to Open and appear in the Chat Assigned tab.
FORM_CREATE.HANDOVER_INSTRUCTION: When enabled, the AI Bot will hand over chats to human agents based on the specified routing conditions.

WEBSITE_SETTINGS.DESCRIPTION: Add website links to be used as knowledge sources for this bot. The bot will use the content from these websites to answer user queries.

WEBSITE_SETTINGS.SINGLE_DESCRIPTION: One link to directly explore its contents

WEBSITE_SETTINGS.DELETE_MODAL_MESSAGE: You will not be able to recover this data

NUMBERING.TITLE: Numbering Configuration
NUMBERING.DESC: Set the automatic number format for each transaction.
NUMBERING.RESET_MONTHLY: Every month (Number resets to 1 at the beginning of the month)
NUMBERING.RESET_YEARLY: Every year (Number returns to 1 at the beginning of the year)
NUMBERING.SUCCESS_MESSAGE: The numbering format data has been successfully saved.
NUMBERING.WARN_MISSING_NUMBER: The format must include [NUMBER] to ensure unique IDs.
NUMBERING.WARN_MISSING_MONTH: The format must include a month variable ([MONTH], [MONTH_ROMAN], [MONTH_SHORT], or [MONTH_LONG]) to avoid duplicate IDs.
NUMBERING.WARN_MISSING_YEAR: The format must include a year variable ([YEAR] or [YEAR_SHORT]) to avoid duplicate IDs.
NUMBERING.WARN_CURRENT_VALUE_TOO_LOW: The next number must be greater than the last generated value ({storedValue}).
NUMBERING.WARN_MIN_VALUE: The next number must be at least 1.
